author: y4rr
content: RetinaNet ResNet-50 FPN architecture added (retinanet.rs, ~600 LoC). LastLevelP6P7 extends FPN constructor. Shared cls/reg heads across P3-P7 (9 anchors/cell, 3 scales × 3 ratios, base sizes [32,64,128,256,512]). Per-class sigmoid scoring (no BG class). Pinned to ferrotorch/retinanet_resnet50_fpn (SHA 3502f96010be).
